OmniScript.description: Shows the applicant test result data that is already stored in Salesforce, and collects new test result data from the applicant.
OmniScript.name: NewTestResultSection

omniProcessElements.name: CANCEL
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Cancel", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "pubsub" : false, "message" : { }, "targetType" : "Record", "objectAction" : "home", "recordAction" : "view", "loginAction" : "login", "targetFilter" : "Recent", "targetId" : "%TestResultsApplicant:PreliminaryApplicationRefId%", "variant" : "brand", "iconName" : "", "iconVariant" : "", "iconPosition" : "left", "replace" : true, "targetLWCLayout" : "lightning", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "showCancelPrompt" : true, "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure you want to cancel? Any unsaved changes will be lost.", "targetName" : "PreliminaryApplicationRef" }

omniProcessElements.name: GetTestResultsApplicant
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Get Applicant Data", "bundle" : "EDUAdmissionsGetApplicantFromIndividualApplnTask", "ignoreCache" : true, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "ContextId", "inputParam" : "IndividualApplicationTaskId" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "TestResultsApplicant", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: SetTestResultsFlexcardAttributes
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Set Flexcard Attributes", "elementValueMap" : { "ACTFlexcardAttributes" : "{\"ContactId\": \"%TestResultsApplicant:ApplicantId%\", \"ExaminationName\": \"ACT\", \"IATId\": \"%ContextId%\", \"IndividualApplicationId\": \"%TestResultsApplicant:ApplicationId%\", \"IsReadOnly\": \"false\"}", "SATFlexcardAttributes" : "{\"ContactId\": \"%TestResultsApplicant:ApplicantId%\", \"ExaminationName\": \"SAT\", \"IATId\": \"%ContextId%\", \"IndividualApplicationId\": \"%TestResultsApplicant:ApplicationId%\", \"IsReadOnly\": \"false\"}", "OtherFlexcardAttributes" : "{\"ContactId\": \"%TestResultsApplicant:ApplicantId%\", \"ExaminationName\": \"Senior Secondary Leaving Examination\", \"IATId\": \"%ContextId%\", \"IndividualApplicationId\": \"%TestResultsApplicant:ApplicationId%\", \"IsReadOnly\": \"false\"}" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock1", "text" : "

If you previously shared information related to this section it will be shown below. Check the box for each item you want to include in this application.

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }
